name: Swordfish W/Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 Swordfish steaks; halved, weighing 12 ounces each
recipeInstructions:
1. Place lemon slices in a 10-inch micro-safe baking dish.
2. Arrange swordfish on top of the lemon.
3. Combine 2 tablespoons olive oil and 2 tablespoons oil from the tomatoes; pour over fish.
4. Sprinkle with rosemary, salt, and pepper.
5. Let stand covered at room temperature for 1 hour.
6. Process tomatoes, garlic, and remaining olive oil in a blender to form paste.
7. Cover fish with microwave-safe plastic wrap, turning back one corner.
8. Microwave on HIGH for 4 minutes.
9. Spread tomato paste over fish.
10. Cover with wrap, turn back the corner, and microwave for 1 minute.
11. Let stand covered for 1 minute.
